title: January Dividend Kings And Princes: 3 Buys And 2 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years." - Dogs of the Dow. The 41 Dividend Kings and 2 Princes (next in line for kingship) (K&P) screened as of December 28, 2022, represented ten of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 9.61%-20.75%.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: 7 Recession-Proof Stocks to Buy as Market Fears Mount
text: As fears mount of a global economic slowdown, investors should start facing reality and consider acquiring recession-proof stocks to buy. Of course, no investment category offers 100% guarantees – otherwise, everyone would take them.

title: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Cost Savings Aid Amid Rising Costs
text: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) is focused on undertaking relevant cost-cutting initiatives and pricing actions to counter inflation. The company is progressing well with expanding global business.

title: Our 7 Top Dividend Stock Picks for 2023
text: The top dividend stock picks for 2023 are surefire ways for investors to protect themselves against several current issues. Their dividends provide extra returns for portfolios that have been battered in a very difficult 2022.
